title: Cenozoic Ore Fossilmon
description: Brand New Fossilmon Resurrected With Ores in Cenozoic Variants
body:
How to Install Download the latest version from Modrinth, and add the Folder to both "resourcepacks" folder and, when creating a world, to "datapacks" folder.

Discord addon link: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261567772828241920

For suggestions, teasers, and polls, check out this Discord thread: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261193541422551100

Adds Cenozoic Themed Ore Fossilmons that can be resurrected with Ice & Ores.

It includes the following:

Mastocu/Mammocopper
Type: Ice/Electric
Ore: Copper
Cenozoic Creature: Woolly Mammoth
Evolve at Level 39

Glypfe/Doediron
Type: Ice/Steel
Ore: Iron
Cenozoic Creature: Doedicurus
Evolve at Level 39

Coelau/Elasmogold
Type: Ice/Fairy
Ore: Gold
Cenozoic Creature: Coelodonta (Woolly Rhinoceros)
Evolve at Level 39

Sabrea/Smiliaspis
Type: Ice/Fairy
Ore: Diamond
Cenozoic Creature: Smilodon (Saber Toothed Cat)
Evolve at Level 39

Berelk/Emeraloceros
Type: Ice/Psychic
Ore: Emerald
Cenozoic Creature: Megaloceros (Irish Elk)
Evolve at Level 39

Andrewsoul/Nethresarchus
Type: Ice/Dark
Ore: Netherite
Cenozoic Creature: Andrewsarchus
Evolve at Level 39

Indicresin/Paraceramber
Type: Ice/Grass
Ore: Resin Brick (Dark Oak Sapling For Now)
Cenozoic Creature: Paraceratherium
Evolve at Level 39

Nanoboa/Boarouge
Type: Ice/Electric
Ore: Redstone
Cenozoic Creature: Titanoboa
Evolve at Level 37

Titachic/Kelazuli
Type: Ice/Fairy
Ore: Lapis Lazuli
Cenozoic Creature: Terror Birds
Evolve at Level 37

Sloquartz/Shastasmoke
Type: Ice/Fire
Ore: Quartz
Cenozoic Creature: Giant Ground Sloths
Evolve at Level 30

Amekeryx/Sivathyst
Type: Ice/Psychic
Ore: Amethyst
Cenozoic Creature: Sivatherium
Evolve at Level 30

Direcoal/Aenocytar
Type: Ice/Fire
Ore: Coal
Cenozoic Creature: Aenocyon (Dire Wolf)
Evolve at Level 30

Brontau/Megacegold
Type: Ice/Fire
Ore: Nether Gold
Cenozoic Creature: Megacerops
Evolve at Level 39

Entelin/Daeolin
Type: Ice/Dark
Ore: Gilded Blackstone
Cenozoic Creature: Daeodon
Evolve at Level 30

Otopris/Megalopris/Megaloguard
Type: Ice/Water- Psychic/Water
Ore: Prismarine Shards
Cenozoic Creature: Megalodon
Evolve at Level 24 & Level 48

Prisceto/Dorupris
Type: Ice/Water
Ore: Prismarine Crystals
Cenozoic Creature: Dorudon
Evolve at Level 39

Icaroglow/Necroturnal
Type: Ice/Dragon
Ore: Glowstone Dust
Cenozoic Creature: Icaronycteris
Evolve at Level 39

Eohorse/Stonequid, Toxohema, or Morosky
Type: Ice/Normal -> Ice/Rock, Ice/Ground, or Ice/Flying
Ore: Tumblestones
Cenozoic Creature: Eohippus, Western Horse, Toxodon, and Moropus
Evolve using the types of tumblestones: Stonequid (Tumblestone), Toxohema (Black Tumblestone), or Morosky (Sky Tumblestone)
